scores.correctness_notes: Priority order given as BlockedStatus > MaintenanceStatus > WaitingStatus > ActiveStatus, omitting ErrorStatus at the top. The gold standard also notes it is an error to call add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus — the agent omits this constraint entirely. Core usage pattern and code example are otherwise accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the claim that 'for equal-priority statuses, the first one added wins' is not in the gold standard but is not clearly fabricated; all API names and method signatures are real
